Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter | Lip Balm with Petroleum Jelly

Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter flavor will help provide your lips with the essential moisturization they need to keep feeling and looking healthy from Chapped, Dry, Cracked, or Damaged Lips. This Lip Balm by Vaseline was formulated in an easy use stick form with Vitamin-E to help provide ultimate hydration and Petroleum Jelly to help lock in the moisture. Vaseline Lip Therapy helps to keep your lips hydrated no matter what the day throws at you. Whether in your pocket, your desk, or car this Vaseline Lip Balm needs to be easily accessible to help protect and soothe your lips.

- Chapped Lips

Key Features

  • Vaseline Lip Therapy Cocoa Butter flavor will help provide your lips with the essential daily moisturization they need.
  • This Lip Balm by Vaseline helps provide a fast-acting solution to any Chapped, Dry, Cracked, or Damaged Lips.
  • Vaseline’s Lip Therapy was formulated with Vitamin-E to help provide ultimate hydration and Petroleum Jelly to help lock in the moisture.
  • This handy pocket-sized lip balm is non-sticky and non-greasy formula to help spread on easily and sooth your damaged lips.
  • Whether in your pocket, your desk, or car this Vaseline Lip Balm needs to be easily accessible to help protect and sooth your lips.

- Cracked Lips

This handy pocket-sized lip balm is non-sticky and non-greasy formula to help spread on easily and sooth your damaged lips. Our lips have an amazing ability to experience heightened sensations which allows us to feel the slightest touch and senses. However, unlike your skin, the skin on your lips does not naturally create its own moisture layer leaving them susceptible to dryness and cracking. Vaseline’s stylish Lip Therapy balm comes in an original retro look that is perfect to help keep your lips from being chapped, dry, or cracked.
